projects.title: Campfire Games
projects.description: A party game iOS app featuring 13 AI-powered games (truth or dare, never have I ever, hot takes, spy mode, charades, story mode) using Apple’s Foundation Models for fully on-device prompt generation — no internet required. One-time purchase, no subscriptions, privacy-first (no data collected).
features: On-device AI using Apple’s Foundation Models framework
13 game modes with infinite, non-repeating prompts
Three intensity levels: Mild, Spicy, Unhinged
Supports 5 languages; compatible with iPhone 15 Pro+ and iPad/Mac with M-series chips

projects.title: Roulette de Movie
projects.description: A free iOS utility app that solves movie-night indecision by letting users build a personal watchlist and spin a roulette wheel to pick what to watch next. Fully local, privacy-first — no account, no data collection.
features: Movie search and personal collection management
Spin-wheel randomizer with haptic feedback
Watched status tracking with badge system
15 languages supported; all data stored locally on device

projects.title: Powder — BDUI Rendering Framework
projects.description: A cross-platform Swift framework that renders entire screens and SwiftUI components from JSON at compile time with optimized performance. Ships as a dynamic XCFramework targeting iOS 16+ and macOS 14+, with a built-in analytics pipeline and A/B experimentation engine.
features: Compile-time JSON-to-SwiftUI rendering — no runtime interpretation overhead
A/B experimentation engine with assignment, targeting, and resolution
Built-in analytics pipeline (collection, aggregation, provider bridging)
Distributed as a cross-platform XCFramework (iOS 16+, macOS 14+)

projects.title: Bakery — Native macOS BDUI Design Tool
projects.description: A native macOS SwiftUI design tool for authoring BDUI screens and components, rendered in real-time by Powder inside the canvas — similar in concept to Figma. The design output is a JSON file consumed directly by Powder on client apps, making what you design in Bakery exactly what users see in production.
features: Real-time WYSIWYG canvas powered by the Powder rendering engine
JSON-first output consumed directly by Powder on client apps
Experimentation hub for designing and previewing A/B test variants
WebSocket-powered real-time collaboration
Localization support for multi-language screen authoring

projects.title: Backend driven UI engine
projects.description: A collection of libraries containing design, rendering engine and analytics wrapper designed to maximize product flexibility and optimal for A/B testing.
features: Picaso: Standalone design system --SharedUIKit-- framework.
Davinci: Translate JSON into trackable actions and render UI.
Kowalski: Abstract analytics engine compatible with 3rd-party and in-house analytics technologies.

projects.title: Personal Accounting App
projects.description: A SwiftUI app using the MV architectural design pattern & Vapor 4 backend powered by PostgreSQL database, allowing users to track, categorize, and share expenses seamlessly across devices with Apple Pay integration.
features: Auto import expenses using Apple Pay
Family & Friends expense sharing
Weekly expense report notifications

projects.title: Cryptocurrency Market Prediction
projects.description: An app leveraging LSTM models with historical data to predict cryptocurrency trends. Developed using SwiftUI, Node.js, MongoDB, and integrated with real-time data feeds using WebSockets.
features: Real-time cryptocurrency rates
Prediction model using LSTM
Cross-platform syncing with RESTful APIs
